description: Required base licenses that all hunters must purchase before buying species-specific licenses.

licenses.name: Conservation License
licenses.notes: Required for all hunters and anglers. Must be purchased before any hunting or fishing license.

licenses.name: Base Hunting License
licenses.notes: Required base license for all hunters. Must be purchased before any species-specific hunting license.

description: Bundled licenses that include multiple species and offer cost savings for hunters pursuing multiple species.

licenses.name: Resident Sportsman License
licenses.notes: Includes Conservation License, Base Hunting License, deer combo, elk, fishing, and more. Best value for resident hunters who pursue multiple species.

licenses.name: Nonresident Combination (Deer, Elk, Fishing)
licenses.notes: Includes Conservation License, Base Hunting License, deer combo, elk, and fishing license. Best value for nonresident hunters pursuing deer and elk.

licenses.name: Resident Deer Combo (Deer A + Deer B)
licenses.notes: Includes one general deer license (Deer A) and one antlerless deer license (Deer B). Resident only.

description: Licenses for mule deer and white-tailed deer hunting.

licenses.name: Resident General Deer License (Deer A)
licenses.notes: Resident general deer license. Allows harvest of 1 deer (either sex unless restricted by district). Over-the-counter.

licenses.name: Nonresident General Deer License
licenses.notes: Nonresident general deer license. Allows harvest of 1 deer. Over-the-counter.

licenses.name: Resident Deer B License (Antlerless)
licenses.notes: Antlerless deer license. Available over-the-counter in select districts; by drawing in others. Resident only.

licenses.name: Nonresident Deer B License (Antlerless)
licenses.notes: Antlerless deer license for nonresidents. Available by drawing in select districts.

description: Licenses for Rocky Mountain elk hunting.

licenses.name: Resident General Elk License
licenses.notes: Resident general elk license. Allows harvest of 1 bull elk (antlerless by Elk B only). Over-the-counter.

licenses.name: Nonresident General Elk License
licenses.notes: Nonresident general elk license. Allows harvest of 1 bull elk. Over-the-counter.

licenses.name: Resident Elk B License (Antlerless)
licenses.notes: Antlerless elk license. Available over-the-counter or by drawing depending on district.

licenses.name: Nonresident Elk B License (Antlerless)
licenses.notes: Antlerless elk license for nonresidents. Available by drawing in select districts.

description: Licenses for pronghorn antelope hunting. All antelope licenses are by special drawing.

licenses.name: Resident Antelope License
licenses.notes: Resident antelope license. By special drawing; application deadline June 1.

licenses.name: Nonresident Antelope License
licenses.notes: Nonresident antelope license. By special drawing; application deadline June 1.

licenses.name: Resident Antelope B License (Antlerless)
licenses.notes: Antlerless antelope license for residents. By drawing in select districts.

licenses.name: Nonresident Antelope B License (Antlerless)
licenses.notes: Antlerless antelope license for nonresidents. By drawing in select districts.

description: Licenses for black bear hunting. Over-the-counter for both residents and nonresidents.

licenses.name: Resident Black Bear License
licenses.notes: Over-the-counter. First-time buyers must complete the Black Bear Identification Test online before purchasing.

licenses.name: Nonresident Black Bear License
licenses.notes: Over-the-counter. First-time buyers must complete the Black Bear Identification Test online before purchasing.

description: Licenses for trophy species available only through the annual special drawing process. Application fees are non-refundable.

licenses.name: Resident Bighorn Sheep License
licenses.notes: By special drawing. Application deadline May 1. Extremely limited tags; very low odds.

licenses.name: Nonresident Bighorn Sheep License
licenses.notes: By special drawing. Application deadline May 1. Nonresident quota is 10% of available tags.

licenses.name: Resident Moose License
licenses.notes: By special drawing. Application deadline May 1. Very limited tags.

licenses.name: Nonresident Moose License
licenses.notes: By special drawing. Application deadline May 1. Nonresident quota is 10% of available tags.

licenses.name: Resident Mountain Goat License
licenses.notes: By special drawing. Application deadline May 1. Very limited tags.

licenses.name: Nonresident Mountain Goat License
licenses.notes: By special drawing. Application deadline May 1. Nonresident quota is 10% of available tags.

licenses.name: Resident Bison License
licenses.notes: By special drawing. Application deadline May 1. Extremely limited tags.

licenses.name: Nonresident Bison License
licenses.notes: By special drawing. Application deadline May 1. Nonresident quota is 10% of available tags.

description: Licenses for mountain lion (cougar) hunting. Available over-the-counter in most districts; quota-based system.

licenses.name: Resident Mountain Lion License
licenses.notes: Over-the-counter in most districts. Season closes when district quota is met. Check current quota status before hunting.

licenses.name: Nonresident Mountain Lion License
licenses.notes: Over-the-counter in most districts. Season closes when district quota is met. Check current quota status before hunting.

description: Licenses for pheasant, grouse, partridge, and other upland game birds.

licenses.name: Resident Upland Game Bird License
licenses.notes: Covers pheasant, grouse (all species), partridge, and other upland game birds. Over-the-counter.

licenses.name: Nonresident Upland Game Bird License
licenses.notes: Covers pheasant, grouse (all species), partridge, and other upland game birds. Over-the-counter.

description: Licenses for spring and fall wild turkey hunting. Over-the-counter.

licenses.name: Resident Wild Turkey License (Spring)
licenses.notes: Spring turkey license. Over-the-counter. Gobblers and bearded hens only.

licenses.name: Nonresident Wild Turkey License (Spring)
licenses.notes: Spring turkey license. Over-the-counter. Gobblers and bearded hens only.

licenses.name: Resident Wild Turkey License (Fall)
licenses.notes: Fall turkey license. Over-the-counter. Either-sex in most districts.

licenses.name: Nonresident Wild Turkey License (Fall)
licenses.notes: Fall turkey license. Over-the-counter. Either-sex in most districts.

description: Licenses for waterfowl and other migratory bird hunting. Federal duck stamp also required.

licenses.name: Resident Migratory Bird License
licenses.notes: Covers ducks, geese, coots, and other migratory birds. Federal duck stamp ($27) also required. Over-the-counter.

licenses.name: Nonresident Migratory Bird License
licenses.notes: Covers ducks, geese, coots, and other migratory birds. Federal duck stamp ($27) also required. Over-the-counter.

licenses.name: Federal Duck Stamp
licenses.notes: Required for all waterfowl hunters age 16 and older. Purchase at post offices, sporting goods stores, or online at store.usgs.gov.

licenses.name: Resident Sandhill Crane License
licenses.notes: By special drawing. Application deadline June 1. Available in select zones.

licenses.name: Nonresident Sandhill Crane License
licenses.notes: By special drawing. Application deadline June 1. Available in select zones.

description: Licenses for wolf hunting and trapping. Over-the-counter.

licenses.name: Resident Wolf License
licenses.notes: Over-the-counter. First wolf license included with Sportsman license at $10. Quota-based by district.

licenses.name: Nonresident Wolf License
licenses.notes: Over-the-counter. Quota-based by district. Season closes when district quota is met.

description: Discounted licenses for hunters under 12 years of age.

licenses.name: Youth Conservation License (Under 12)
licenses.notes: Free for hunters under 12 years of age.

licenses.name: Youth Base Hunting License (Under 12)
licenses.notes: Free for hunters under 12 years of age. Hunter education required.

licenses.name: Youth Deer License (Under 12)
licenses.notes: Free for hunters under 12 years of age.

licenses.name: Youth Elk License (Under 12)
licenses.notes: Free for hunters under 12 years of age.

description: Key application deadlines for special drawing licenses.

deadlines.notes: Apply online at fwp.mt.gov or at any FWP office.
Apply online at fwp.mt.gov or at any FWP office.
Apply online at fwp.mt.gov or at any FWP office.
Apply online at fwp.mt.gov or at any FWP office.
Only for districts requiring a drawing. Most districts are OTC.
